name: ‘~•D3r3lord3•~’
description:
|•~ D3R3LORD3 x AVERYTHEMAYO ~•|

Even someone with infinite knowledge can be oblivious to affection. In this story, Derek and Avery are cuddling together one night, everything felt peaceful. Derek, despite being omniscient, has no idea how to respond to Avery’s clingy affection. (Intended for Avery POV)

I added headcanons to this, he’s not entirely accurate. Credits to my sister for begging me to make this, and credits to whoever the owner of the art for the pfp is! ;-;
creator: Wife_of_GhosMW
